/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/spatial/test_grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/core/test_vec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/core/test_matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/random/test_random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/particle/test_species.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/particle/test_pusher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/particle/test_boundary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/particle/test_emitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/em/test_poisson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/em/test_electric_field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/interpolate/test_weight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/interpolate/test_field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/collisions/test_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/collisions/test_scattering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/collisions/test_reactions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/collisions/test_mcc.cpp.o -o tests  libspark.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.a ../_deps/hypre-build/libHYPRE.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.a
